name: Drarana Thelis
bio:
Physical Appearance: Dunmer (Dark Elf) female wearing middle-class attire - a burgundy linen shirt, burgundy linens, and thick cowhide shoes. Carries a small amount of gold. Does not carry weapons.
Race: Dunmer
Personality Keywords: simple, concerned, social, vigilant
Role: Drarana Thelis is a healer living in the town of Harlun's Watch. She will request assistance in investigating the disappearance of some of her townsfolk.
Home Location Information: Her house in Harlun's Watch.
Daily Routine: Drarana gets out of bed early at 4am and spends the entire day wandering around town, occasionally talking with her neighbors. She goes back inside her house at 8pm for a two-hour dinner before heading to bed at 10pm.
Magical Abilities: Drarana doesn't carry any weapons, relying instead on a series of leveled spells from all magical schools except Mysticism.
Personality - The Concerned Neighbor: Much like her fellow townsfolk, Drarana leads a pretty simple and uncomplicated life, preferably out in the open. She's social and engaged with her community, spending her days among her neighbors. The disappearance of townsfolk troubles her enough to seek outside help.
author: Bethesda
